<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep the description focused on the "why". -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? -->

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore / refactor / docs / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and agree to the SheJane Contributor License Agreement (`CLA.md`).
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (or the relevant focused suite)
- [ ] If I edited `api_schemas.py` or a `response_model`, I ran `make schemas` and committed the regenerated files
- [ ] No platform-paid provider keys added to the Python daemon (invariant #1)
- [ ] Billing paths reserve → settle/release on every exit, if touched
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, trade-offs, follow-ups, or screenshots for UI changes. -->
